name: Keisha Brown
headline: ML Practitioner | Former Math Teacher | Bootcamp Grad
summary: Self-taught ML practitioner and former high school math teacher. Transitioned into ML via an intensive bootcamp, followed by 18 months of freelance contract data-science work.

experience.description: Kaggle-style freelance contracts: feature engineering, model tuning, small-scale deployment.
Taught AP Statistics and Calculus prior to career transition.
